scope: Route-backed provider lifecycle/status badges on live detail, chart, Book/orderbook, and ticket handoff

assertions.backendHealth: Backend /api/health was required before launch; the proof aborts instead of falling back when unavailable.
assertions.liveRouteStatusReady: Live detail consumed route-backed liveDataStatus with live-data-status-ready and live-data-source-polymarket-gamma.
assertions.serverRuntime: Expo launched with EXPO_PUBLIC_ORDER_MODE=server and EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL set to the supplied BackendBaseUrl.
assertions.bookRefreshing: Opening Book produces a visible provider-lifecycle-refreshing Book depth refreshing state before the resolved depth state.
assertions.bookRouteDepthReady: Resolved Book depth uses orderbook-source-orderbook-route and orderbook-status-ready rather than fixture depth.
assertions.ticketServerMode: Ticket settings exposes Trading mode: Server mode while preserving provider-source-polymarket selection identity.
assertions.fallbackGuard: The top, Book, and ticket hierarchies reject deterministic-status-fixture, fixture-ready, mock-ready, and default-ready markers.
